title: rhamnus incana
intro: Rhamnus incana, also known as the Grey Buckthorn or Grey Frangula, is a shrub-like plant species belonging to the Rhamnaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides, which are responsible for its purgative and laxative effects. The health benefits of Rhamnus incana include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve constipation, and support the treatment of various gastrointestinal disorders. Rhamnus incana can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or dried extract, and it is often used in herbal medicine to promote bowel movements and cleanse the digestive system.
